TypedExtensionsWithParameterExtendedData Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Overload List
  NameDescription
WithParameterExtendedDataT(ICrudMethodT, Boolean)
Configures the CRUD model to use a ParameterProvider. This method only supports parameter sets that have already been created.
WithParameterExtendedDataT(ICrudMethodT, String)
Configures the CRUD model to use a ParameterProvider. This method supports creation of new parameter sets, where the supplied column name points to the owner of the parent parameter set.

TypedExtensions Class
